prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the Community Infrastructure Levy (CIL) regulations which apply to England, as CIL is a system established under the Planning Act 2008 implemented in England. Therefore, the details regarding CIL appeal decisions and their publication are relevant to England.
